description: Motivated primarily by maximum income as fast as possible. Often early-stage excitement without full appreciation of what STR management involves. High representation in R2R operators who had 100% loss rate. When non-R2R, can convert if income numbers are compelling.
top_fears: management fee eating too much of the profit
being outperformed by a competitor service
top_questions: What is your maximum achievable income for my property?
What is the net income after all your fees?
How do you compare to competitors on income?
what_resonates: STR income significantly higher than LTL net
transparent fee structure with no hidden costs
income projections backed by real comparable data
fast onboarding to start earning quickly
what_to_avoid: promising specific income figures without context
ideal_response_pattern: Lead with income numbers then show the management fee as a small percentage of additional gain over LTL then frame Stayful as income maximiser not income extractor
closing_approach: Income-first presentation. Show the full STR net vs LTL gap. 15% management fee looks small when the gain is large.
follow_up_strategy: Send STR net analyser output showing income breakdown. Include the fee calculation showing net gain over LTL after management fee.
r2r_warning: R2R operators in this archetype (022, 025, 027, 032) all abandoned. R2R commercial lease model does not work with Stayful owner-management model. 100% historical loss rate. Flag any new R2R lead immediately.
london_warning: Entry 006 (Elliot, W4 postcode): 90-day London STR restriction applies. Verify planning status before progressing any London property.
